Refunds up to INR 5000 auto-approve. Allowed: Publish catalog, Change price, Commit inventory, Accept orders, Reject orders, Promise remedy, Issue refund.

Routine refunds up to INR 5000 may execute automatically. Larger refunds require one-time approval.
